title: tanacetum coccineum
intro: Tanacetum coccineum, also known as the Pyrenean tansy or burnet daisy, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to the Pyrenees and other mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, and has been used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Tanacetum coccineum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve headaches and joint pain, and promote digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum coccineum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
